evidence_items.summary: PR sqlite-utils#680 modifies sqlite_utils/db.py COLUMN_TYPE_MAPPING: float and decimal.Decimal map to REAL (was FLOAT). numpy types (np.float16/32/64) also map to REAL. cli.py VALID_COLUMN_TYPES extends to (INTEGER, TEXT, FLOAT, REAL, BLOB) for backward compatibility.

New test test_csv_detect_types_creates_real_columns in tests/test_cli.py: imports a CSV with float column, runs --detect-types, asserts the produced schema string contains `"weight" REAL`. Six existing tests in test_create.py and test_cli.py updated to expect REAL instead of FLOAT.

intent_summary: Phase 6.1'b auto-generated bundle for case_id seed_065_simonw_sqlite_utils_680 (https://github.com/simonw/sqlite-utils PR #680, head_sha e7ecb0ff). Claim C.column_type_mapping.repair_needed (type repair_needed); test_scope tests/test_cli.py::test_csv_detect_types_creates_real_columns.
